channel.title: Oda World
channel.description: Technology, innovation, and ideas across borders.

item.title: Building This Blog with Quarto
item.dc:creator: Craig
item.description:
This site is built with Quarto, a scientific and technical publishing system that works beautifully for blogs.

Why Quarto?

  • Markdown-first — write in .qmd files with optional code execution
  • Fast previews — quarto preview hot-reloads as you edit
  • Flexible output — HTML, PDF, slides, and more from the same source
  • Built-in blog features — listings, categories, RSS feeds, and search

Project structure

.
├── _quarto.yml       # site configuration
├── _brand.yml        # colors, fonts, and branding
├── index.qmd         # home page with post listing
├── about.qmd         # about page
├── posts/            # blog posts (one folder per post)
└── styles.css        # custom styles

Useful commands

# Preview locally with live reload
quarto preview

# Build the full site to _site/
quarto render

# Add a new post
quarto create contents post --title "My New Post" --path posts/my-new-post

Quarto handles the rest — navigation, RSS, and a clean reading experience out of the box.

item.title: Welcome to Oda World
item.dc:creator: Craig
item.description:
This is the first post on Oda World.

The name reflects a simple ambition: write about technology and innovation in a way that crosses borders — between disciplines, cultures, and ways of thinking.

What to expect

Over time, this blog will collect:

  • Build logs — notes from projects in progress
  • Tooling — workflows, scripts, and setups worth keeping
  • Ideas — perspectives that don’t fit neatly in one category

Thanks for reading. More soon.
